message:
chore: remove root vercel.json (apps/web has its own config)

The apps/web directory already contains the correct Vercel configuration.
Deployment should be triggered from that directory, not the root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +0,0 @@
-{
-  "$schema": "https://openapi.vercel.sh/vercel.json",
-  "buildCommand": "cd apps/web && bun run build",
-  "devCommand": "cd apps/web && bun run dev",
-  "installCommand": "bun install",
-  "outputDirectory": "apps/web/.next",
-  "framework": "nextjs"
-}
